name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A little something from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We saw you cancelled your subscription with Bright Smile Dental — totally understand, life shifts and schedules change. No guilt, no hard sell.

If or when you'd like to come back, here's 20% off your next visit:

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for 14 days, and you can use it at checkout next time you book a cleaning or consultation. Our goal has always been to make dental care feel a little less scary — free new-patient consults, painless cleanings, modern tech, zero pressure.

If something about your last experience didn't sit right, I'd genuinely love to hear it — just hit reply. A real person reads every one.

Take care of those teeth either way,
The Bright Smile Dental team

Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a quick heads up that your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} expires in a few days. Use it whenever you're ready, or ignore this. No pressure either way :)

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
